league.description: Football/soccer leagues from various European countries. Contains 8 leagues.

country_name.description: Country where the league is based. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Germany', 'England', 'Switzerland', 'Italy', 'Portugal'.

name.description: Full official name of the league. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Germany 1. Bundesliga', 'England Premier League', 'Italy Serie A'.

player.description: Basic biographical information about football/soccer players. Contains 98 players.

birthday.description: Player's date of birth. Type: TEXT (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format). Examples: '1980-11-25 00:00:00', '1992-03-30 00:00:00'.

height.description: Player's height in centimeters. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Examples: '182.88', '177.8', '187.96'.

player_name.description: Full name of the player. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Aaron Mokoena', 'Aco Stojkov', 'Abdoulaye Diallo'.

weight.description: Player's weight in pounds. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '181', '165', '174', '154'.

player_attributes.description: Detailed skill ratings and attributes for football/soccer players at a specific point in time, similar to FIFA game ratings. Contains 95 records.

acceleration.description: Player's acceleration rating (0-100 scale). Type: TEXT (decimal string). How quickly the player reaches top speed.

aggression.description: Player's aggression rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Willingness to challenge for the ball.

agility.description: Player's agility rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to change direction quickly.

attacking_work_rate.description: Player's offensive work rate. Type: TEXT. Values include 'medium', 'high', 'low'.

balance.description: Player's balance rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to maintain stability under pressure.

ball_control.description: Player's ball control rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to control and trap the ball.

crossing.description: Player's crossing ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Accuracy of crosses from wide positions.

curve.description: Player's curve rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to curve the ball when passing or shooting.

date.description: Date when these attribute ratings were recorded. Type: TEXT (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS). Examples: '2013-09-20 00:00:00'.

defensive_work_rate.description: Player's defensive work rate. Type: TEXT. Values include 'medium', 'high', 'low'.

dribbling.description: Player's dribbling ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Skill at moving with the ball at feet.

finishing.description: Player's finishing ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Accuracy when shooting at goal from close range.

free_kick_accuracy.description: Player's free kick accuracy (0-100). Type: TEXT. Precision when taking free kicks.

gk_diving.description: Goalkeeper diving ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Low values for non-goalkeepers.

gk_handling.description: Goalkeeper handling ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to hold onto the ball after a save.

gk_kicking.description: Goalkeeper kicking ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Distance and accuracy of goal kicks.

gk_positioning.description: Goalkeeper positioning ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to be in the right place.

gk_reflexes.description: Goalkeeper reflexes (0-100). Type: TEXT. Reaction speed to close-range shots.

heading_accuracy.description: Player's heading accuracy (0-100). Type: TEXT. Precision when heading the ball.

interceptions.description: Player's interception ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to read and intercept passes.

jumping.description: Player's jumping ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Vertical leap height.

long_passing.description: Player's long passing accuracy (0-100). Type: TEXT. Accuracy of long-range passes.

long_shots.description: Player's long shot ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Accuracy and power from distance.

marking.description: Player's marking ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to track and stay close to opponents.

overall_rating.description: Player's overall rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Composite score of all abilities. Examples: '67.0', '62.0', '72.0'.

penalties.description: Player's penalty kick taking ability (0-100). Type: TEXT.

player_name.description: Full name of the player these attributes belong to. References player.player_name. Type: TEXT.

positioning.description: Player's attacking positioning (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to find space in the box.

potential.description: Player's potential overall rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Maximum rating the player could reach.

preferred_foot.description: Player's preferred/dominant foot. Type: TEXT. Values: 'right' or 'left'.

reactions.description: Player's reaction speed (0-100). Type: TEXT. How quickly the player responds to situations.

short_passing.description: Player's short passing accuracy (0-100). Type: TEXT.

shot_power.description: Player's shot power (0-100). Type: TEXT. Strength of shots.

sliding_tackle.description: Player's sliding tackle ability (0-100). Type: TEXT.

sprint_speed.description: Player's sprint speed (0-100). Type: TEXT. Maximum running speed.

stamina.description: Player's stamina (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to maintain performance over full match.

standing_tackle.description: Player's standing tackle ability (0-100). Type: TEXT.

vision.description: Player's vision (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to spot passing opportunities.

volleys.description: Player's volley ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Accuracy when striking the ball in mid-air.

team.description: Football/soccer teams with short and long names. Contains 100 teams.

team_long_name.description: Full official name of the team. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Stoke City', 'Tottenham Hotspur', 'SC Bastia', 'Wolverhampton Wanderers'.

team_short_name.description: Abbreviated 3-letter code for the team. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'STK', 'TOT', 'BAS', 'WOL', 'MOU'.

team_attributes.description: Tactical and strategic attributes for football/soccer teams at a specific point in time, similar to FIFA game team ratings. Contains 22 records.

buildUpPlayPassing.description: Build-up play passing rating (0-100). Type: TEXT (numeric string). How much the team relies on passing during build-up.

buildUpPlayPassingClass.description: Classification of build-up passing style. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Mixed', 'Long', 'Short'.

buildUpPlayPositioningClass.description: Build-up play positional strategy. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Organised', 'Free Form'.

buildUpPlaySpeed.description: Build-up play speed rating (0-100). Type: TEXT (numeric string). How quickly the team transitions from defense to attack.

buildUpPlaySpeedClass.description: Classification of build-up speed. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Balanced', 'Slow', 'Fast'.

chanceCreationCrossing.description: Chance creation crossing rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Tendency to create chances via crosses.

chanceCreationCrossingClass.description: Classification of crossing tendency. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Normal', 'Lots', 'Little'.

chanceCreationPassing.description: Chance creation passing rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Tendency to create chances via passing.

chanceCreationPassingClass.description: Classification of passing tendency in chance creation. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Normal', 'Risky', 'Safe'.

chanceCreationPositioningClass.description: Positioning style in chance creation. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Organised', 'Free Form'.

chanceCreationShooting.description: Chance creation shooting rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Tendency to shoot when creating chances.

chanceCreationShootingClass.description: Classification of shooting tendency. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Normal', 'Lots', 'Little'.

date.description: Date when these team attributes were recorded. Type: TEXT (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS). Examples: '2010-02-22 00:00:00'.

defenceAggression.description: Defensive aggression rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. How aggressively the team defends.

defenceAggressionClass.description: Classification of defensive aggression. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Press', 'Contain', 'Double'.

defenceDefenderLineClass.description: Defender line strategy. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Cover', 'Offside Trap'.

defencePressure.description: Defensive pressure rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. How high up the pitch the team presses.

defencePressureClass.description: Classification of defensive pressure level. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Medium', 'High', 'Deep'.

defenceTeamWidth.description: Defensive team width rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. How wide the team spreads when defending.

defenceTeamWidthClass.description: Classification of defensive width. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Normal', 'Wide', 'Narrow'.

team_long_name.description: Full name of the team these attributes belong to. References team.team_long_name. Type: TEXT.
